column1: 今さら謝ったところで、許してもらえない。
column2: いまさらあやまったところで、ゆるしてもらえない。
column3: Even if you apologize now, you won't be forgiven.
column4: たところで (even if ~, even supposing ~, it won't change the fact that)
column6: expresses that even if the action were done, it would not change the outcome; futility of the action
column8: たところで = futile even-if; ても = even if (general concessive); としても = even assuming (hypothetical); たとしても = even if it were the case
